items.caption: A luxury wristwatch with a silver-toned metal case and a black leather strap. the watch face is adorned with a complex design featuring multiple layers of dials and hands, suggesting a high-end, possibly mechanical, timepiece. the watch is set against a dark background, which accentuates its details and craftsmanship. the text "person the whisky watch steel" is visible, indicating the brand or model of the watch.
